info.description: API for managing technical services, clients, equipment, work orders, and materials.
info.title: Service Management API

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of audit logs with optional filters

Authenticate a user with email and password, returns access and refresh tokens
Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token

Retrieve a single brand by ID

Retrieve a single equipment model by ID

get.description: Retrieve a single equipment type by ID

get.description: Retrieve a single material by ID
Query technician locations with optional filters. Administrators see all; technicians see only their own.

post.description: Report current GPS location (technician only). The user_id is automatically set from the authenticated token.

Retrieve a single user by their ID (admin only)
